Hassen Tyler - Office of the Secretary and Office of the Solicitor - Political and Career Appointees - Periodic Transaction  - 278-T - 2025 - 2025-04-21
Hassen Tyler - Office of the Secretary and Office of the Solicitor - Political and Career Appointees - New Entrant  - 278 - 2025 - 2025-02-21
Basin Holdings LLC (parent company of Basin Energy and Basin Industries)
Basin Energy LLC, deferred compensation: cash receivable
Basin Energy LLC (Oilfield equipment manufacturing and oilfield services)
Basin Industries LLC, deferred compensation: cash receivable
Basin Industries LLC (Diversified manufacturing business primarily focused on automotive sector)
Basin Energy AR SPV LLC Equity Position (SPV that holds a debt position in Basin Energy LLC)
Talus Group Holdings LLC, deferred compensation: cash receivable
Talus Group Holdings LLC (Diversified investment platform)
Fidelity Freedom Index 2050 Fund Investor Class Shares (FIPFX)
I sold/relinquished all equity in Basin Energy's subsidiary Wenzel US LLC for $600,000 paid over time. (2020-01-01)
I sold my equity in Basin Industries LLC for $400,000. I expect to receive this cash in installments over the next 4 quarters commencing on March 31, 2025. (2021-01-01)

I sold my preferred units in Basin Holdings LLC for $600,000 paid over 4 quarters commencing September 30, 2025, and ending June 30, 2026, ($150k owed per quarter) and sold equity units for $250,000 paid over 4 quarters commencing June 30, 2025 (2008-08-01)
I sold my equity interest in the company for $1,850,000 and expect to receive that cash by March 31, 2025. (2021-06-01)
I will continue to participate in this defined contribution plan. The plan sponsor ceased making contributions at my separation. (2008-08-01)
Previous services as Partner resulted in earning an equity position
